name: electronic_circuit_merge_tap_unbalanced_capped
notes: Regression for the merge-and-tap Step-6 hang (KC6). Three copper-cable feeders cross the iron-ore trunk at x=20; their west exits land on the iron trunk column, so the copper channel reaches SAT as 3 inputs / 0 outputs — UNSAT by flow conservation, which varisat took unbounded time to prove (6x9/756-var zone). sat::flow_imbalance_reason now refuses such zones instantly; the cluster degrades to a capped/unresolved junction instead of hanging. Captured from electronic-circuit@35/s from ore with the merge-tap fallback enabled.
